databrew.dataset.pathoptions.FilesLimit.Description: If provided, this structure imposes a limit on a number of files that should be selected.

databrew.dataset.pathoptions.LastModifie.Description: If provided, this structure defines a date range for matching Amazon S3 objects based on their LastModifiedDate attribute in Amazon S3.

databrew.dataset.pathoptions.Parameters.Description: A structure that maps names of parameters used in the Amazon S3 path of a dataset to their definitions.
